attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CVD (Cardiovascular) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CVD casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Age inferred as ~52 adult — source gives weight 70 kg and a 3 kg loss but no age; please confirm on clinician review.
Sex inferred as male — not stated in source; bicuspid aortic valve is somewhat more common in males; please confirm.
Geography inferred RA1_major_city — not stated in source.

Telehealth reprojection applied: clinician auscultation of the new early diastolic (aortic regurgitation) murmur, palpation of splenomegaly, and measured vitals (HR 102, BP 110/65, RR 18, SpO2 97%) were sealed into nodes 10/11; the fever was reprojected to a patient home-thermometer reading and the Osler's nodes / splinter haemorrhages to video-observable findings in node 01.
Provisional case_id SPEC-CARD-01-00216 — ingest --reseq will assign the real sequence.

Baseline tier set to T5 (000 ambulance) reflecting a toxic, socially-isolated patient with suspected endocarditis at risk of sudden decompensation; minimum-viable-for-pass T4 (self-transport ED) as the defensible floor.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
